## Type of change

## How was this tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked the issue this closes (`Closes #xxx`)
- [ ] If this changes product behavior (ChannelAdapter interface, pipeline, EventMessage, REST API, webhook contract), the design was discussed in the issue / Discussions first
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Lint, type-check, and tests all pass locally (`bun run lint`, `bun run typecheck`, `bun test`)
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private info in the diff
